location: In a chest inside the Grand Cloister, at the bottom of Lake of Rot in the Ainsel River area (reached via Nokstella, Eternal City).
tactics: Cross the rot-infested swamp of Lake of Rot to reach the Grand Cloister's large statue entrance, then use interior ledges to drop down to the bottom floor.
The Cloister is crowded with Kindred of Rot casting Pest Threads — don't linger in the open or multiple casters will overwhelm you with rot buildup.
Head west from the bottom of the drop to reach the chest; nearby corpses in the same room also carry Golden Runes worth grabbing.
lore: Fashioned from the tail of a great scorpion and left glistening with scarlet rot, this dagger served as a ceremonial tool for heretics working with a relic drawn from a sealed Outer God.

builds.name: Scarlet Rot applicator
builds.why: Innate 120 Scarlet Rot buildup and its Repeating Thrust skill make it one of the fastest ways to proc rot on tough single targets, including dragons.

builds.name: Dex quality dagger with rot utility
builds.why: Solid C-tier Dexterity and D Strength scaling let it double as a competent physical dagger even outside dedicated rot builds.
